mapper.insert:
/* com.shop.mapper.product.productContentList.insertProductContents */ INSERT INTO TB_CONTENTS ( NEWS_TYPE , NEWS_TITLE ,
NEWS_SUB_TITLE,
NEWS_CONTENTS,
FILE_ID,
PARTNER_ID, CRE_USER, UPD_USER ) VALUES ( #{newsType} , #{newsTitle} ,
#{newsSubTitle} ,
#{newsContents} ,
#{fileId} ,
#{partnerId} , #{creUser} , #{updUser} )

/* com.shop.mapper.product.productContentList.insertContentsProduct */ INSERT INTO TB_CONTENTS_PRODUCT ( SEQ , CONTENTS_ID , PRODUCT_ID, CRE_USER, UPD_USER ) VALUES ( get_next_contents_product_seq(#{contentsId}) , #{contentsId} , #{productId} , #{creUser} , #{updUser} )
